yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_GhostClaw_AI_Assisted_Malware_Attacking_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for GhostClaw AI Assisted Malware Attacking macOS Users to Deploy Credential-Stealin"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-26"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "GhostClaw" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_IDrive_for_Windows_Vulnerability_Let_Att {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for IDrive for Windows Vulnerability Let Attackers Escalate Privileges"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-26"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CISA Warns of Langflow Code Injection Vulnerability Exploited in Attacks"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-26"

    condition:
        any of them
}

}

        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for 800,000 WordPress Sites Affected by Arbitrary File Read Vulnerability in Smart S"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-26"

                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "WordPress" ascii wide nocase
        $kw1 = "WordPress" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 105 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 68 as HIGH risk. 31 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, UNC-UNKNOWN, CDB-APT-22. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
